UrbanTrack is a community issue reporting platform for tracking and managing local issues.
Users can create reports with a title, description, photo, and location.
Reports can be upvoted by community members to indicate priority.
Each report has a tracking status: Open, In Progress, Resolved.
Admins can assign reports, change statuses, and moderate content.
Users can view reports on a map and filter by status and category.
The platform exposes API endpoints for creating reports and fetching user report history.
Authentication uses standard email/password sign-up and optional OAuth providers.
User settings include profile info, notification preferences, and privacy options.
For troubleshooting, check network connectivity, verify location permissions, and inspect server logs for errors.
